Subject: NAM -- Special Recess Edition of Briefing
Message:
To:		NAM Members

From:		Doug Kurkul
	

Today's special recess edition of Briefing highlights four policy issues
that require your immediate action:  economic stimulus, trade promotion
authority, terrorist reinsurance and comprehensive energy legislation.
Other issues affecting your bottom line featured include:  OSHA
recordkeeping, agribusiness antitrust, Internet tax moratorium and more.

If you're not already a Briefing by E-mail subscriber but want to be added
to our list, e-mail mcox@nam.org <mailto:mcox@nam.org>.  Briefing by E-mail
is published weekly when Congress is in session.  The next edition will be
published Friday, November 30.

Read today's issue at <http://www.nam.org/briefing_newsletter>.



**Link not working properly?** 
Sometimes links are broken when they are transmitted via e-mail 
or if your e-mail program does not support hyperlinks. When this  
happens we suggest you copy and paste the URL into your browser. 
This way you can get the whole link as sometimes it carries over 
onto the next line. When you do this, make sure there are no 
spaces in the link.
